branchPolicy.rule: Use the integration branch for dependency-ordered extraction. Use short-lived branches only for truly parallel work that passes its own contract tests before rebasing.

workstreams.name: program-governance
workstreams.intent: machine-validated plan, TDD, evidence and release gates

workstreams.name: migration-bridge
workstreams.intent: preserve compatibility while removing mixed dependencies

workstreams.name: infrastructure
workstreams.intent: CI, publisher, checkpoints and security contracts

workstreams.name: field-revenue-validation
workstreams.intent: client delivery, commercial value and operating evidence

workstreams.name: task-surface-platform
workstreams.intent: protocol-neutral task services, public projections, theme/site/growth contracts and adapters

techPlacements.role: lexical baseline, duplicate and neighbor gate

techPlacements.activation: activate after at least 100 independent labeled outcomes and held-out gain

techPlacements.role: current vector and facility numeric kernels
techPlacements.activation: promote only with parity and bridge-inclusive end-to-end gain

techPlacements.role: artifact or checkpoint authenticity where threat model requires it
techPlacements.activation: explicit key lifecycle and verification test

techPlacements.role: tokens, voice, layout and CSS constraints

techPlacements.activation: held-out gain over lexical and graph baseline
brand, rights, accessibility and client approval gates

techPlacements.role: canonical structural input/output validation and schema references

techPlacements.activation: comparison adapter after internal ABI passes

techPlacements.role: bidirectional event, snapshot, delta, interrupt and resume adapter
techPlacements.activation: comparison adapter after internal ABI passes
comparison adapter after sandbox and CSP gates
adopt compatible identity semantics before literal wire conformance
activate only behind immutable policy and audit contracts

techPlacements.role: surface traces, metrics, logs and cost telemetry

techPlacements.activation: rename and promote only after held-out gain over typed JSON and graph baselines

phases.name: baseline-and-governance
phases.exit: plan validator, frozen baseline and CI evidence

phases.name: dependency-decomposition
phases.exit: neutral framework path has no content-math imports and legacy parity passes

phases.name: hyper-site-independent-ship
phases.exit: create/dev/build/preview/deploy works on a real five-page fixture

phases.name: hyper-content-independent-ship
phases.exit: real provider PCN-to-ArticleIR-to-site cohort accepted under held-out review

phases.name: first-client-and-revenue
phases.exit: one paid or contractually committed delivery with measured client value

phases.name: scale-and-calibration
phases.exit: advanced methods promoted or rejected by preregistered experiments

researchHypotheses.claim: H200-class memory may permit a 70B model, embedding model and image model to reside concurrently
researchHypotheses.test: Measure exact quantization, KV cache, runtime overhead and concurrent peak VRAM; do not infer from nominal parameter bytes.
researchHypotheses.pass: p95 peak VRAM <= 85% device memory with target concurrency and no swapping
researchHypotheses.fail: Use staged loading, smaller models, multi-GPU or hosted providers.

researchHypotheses.claim: DeepSeek V4 Flash can be the bulk prose provider at low unit cost
researchHypotheses.test: Frozen 25-page cohort against at least one alternative provider with blinded rubric and full retry cost.
researchHypotheses.pass: Noninferior quality within preregistered margin and at least 30% lower accepted-page cost.
researchHypotheses.fail: Retain as comparison or fallback provider.

researchHypotheses.claim: BGE-M3 improves information-gain or neighbor judgments
researchHypotheses.test: Held-out labeled pairs and page decisions against BM25 plus graph baseline.
researchHypotheses.pass: Statistically meaningful recall or decision improvement with acceptable latency and cost.

researchHypotheses.test: Scalar parity plus repeated bridge-inclusive pipeline benchmark.
researchHypotheses.pass: Same outputs within tolerance and at least 15% p50 full-run improvement without p95 regression.
researchHypotheses.fail: Retain source but do not activate.

researchHypotheses.claim: One protocol-neutral task-surface ABI can map to A2UI, AG-UI, MCP Apps and the AMTECH AI Employee fixture without widening capabilities or losing required semantics
researchHypotheses.test: Freeze one service fixture and measure field, lifecycle, action, receipt, recovery and privacy parity across adapters.
researchHypotheses.pass: All required semantics round-trip; private projection leaks and capability widening are zero; documented adapter-specific loss is noncritical.
researchHypotheses.fail: Keep adapters separate, narrow the common ABI, or reject the incompatible adapter.

researchHypotheses.claim: A compact relationship-projection notation improves semantic extraction or validation over typed JSON and graph/event baselines
researchHypotheses.test: Rename the format and compare canonical parsing, bytes, tokens, schema evolution, provenance, replay, model extraction and policy failures on frozen fixtures.
researchHypotheses.pass: Material preregistered gain without interoperability, safety or maintenance regression.
researchHypotheses.fail: Preserve as noncanonical research and use established typed formats.

tddPolicy.red: Each implementation step starts with a failing contract or characterization test.
tddPolicy.green: Named tests plus inherited regressions pass.
tddPolicy.refactor: Boundaries and behavior remain green after cleanup.
